name: Great Ghost Pumpkin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine flour, oats, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt in a bowl; set aside.
3. In a large bowl, cream butter until smooth. Gradually add brown sugar and granulated sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
4. Add the beaten egg and vanilla extract; mix well.
5. Alternate adding dry ingredients and pumpkin to the butter mixture, mixing after each addition.
6. Stir in the chocolate morsels.
7. For each cookie, scoop 1/4 cup of dough onto a lightly greased baking sheet. Use a thin metal spatula to shape the dough into ghost shapes.
8. Alternatively, create a ghost pattern on heavy paper and place cookies on top for added detail.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until firm and lightly browned. Remove from cookie sheets and let cool on wire racks.
10. Spread white royal icing over the cookies. Use black royal icing to add facial features like eyes and mouth.
11. This recipe yields approximately 19-20 large cookies.
